alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a quinoline which carries an aroyl group at the 2-position. An aroyl group is a univalent radical R-CO- derived from an aromatic carboxylic acid.
alternative_parents.name: 2-aroylquinolines

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an isoquinoline to which a benzyl group is attached.
alternative_parents.name: Benzylisoquinolines

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a system of three linearly fused benzene rings.
alternative_parents.name: Anthracenes

alternative_parents.description: Aromatic compounds containing a ketone substituted by one aryl group, and a phenyl group.
alternative_parents.name: Aryl-phenylketones

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an amino group attached to a quinoline ring system.
alternative_parents.name: Aminoquinolines and derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the dialkyl ether functional group, with the formula ROR', where R and R' are aryl groups.
alternative_parents.name: Diarylethers

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a hydrogenated quinoline bearing a ketone group.
alternative_parents.name: Hydroquinolones

alternative_parents.description: Aromatic polycyclic compounds containing a ketone bearing isoquinoline moiety.
alternative_parents.name: Isoquinolones and derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of  quinoline in which in which at least one double bond in the quinoline moiety are reduced by adding two hydrogen atoms.
alternative_parents.name: Hydroquinolines

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a pyridine ring bearing a carboxylic acid group or a derivative thereof.
alternative_parents.name: Pyridinecarboxylic acids and derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a phenylpropane moiety.
alternative_parents.name: Phenylpropanes

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an aminobenzene moiety.
alternative_parents.name: Aniline and substituted anilines

alternative_parents.description: Aromatic compounds contaning a phenoxy group.
alternative_parents.name: Phenoxy compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an acyl moiety of benzoic acid with the formula (C6H5CO-).
alternative_parents.name: Benzoyl derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Aromatic compounds containing an ether group substituted with a benzene ring.
alternative_parents.name: Phenol ethers

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a pyridine ring, which bears a ketone.
alternative_parents.name: Pyridinones

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an amine group, which is indirectly attached to a carbonyl via an intervening vinyl (>C=C<) moiety.
alternative_parents.name: Vinylogous amides

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing an aromatic ring where a carbon atom is linked to an hetero atom.
alternative_parents.name: Heteroaromatic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a lactam ring, which is a cyclic amide of amino carboxylic acids, having a 1-azacycloalkan-2-one structure (or an analogue having unsaturation or heteroatoms replacing one or more carbon atoms of the ring).
alternative_parents.name: Lactams

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an heterocycle with at least one nitrogen atom and one carbon atom linked to each other.
alternative_parents.name: Azacyclic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Amines having the nitrogen atom linked to exactly two hydrocarbyl groups.
alternative_parents.name: Secondary amines

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a bond between carbon a pnictogen atom. Pnictogens are p-block element atoms that are in the group 15 of the periodic table.
alternative_parents.name: Organopnictogen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

class.description: Compounds containing a quinoline moiety, which consists of a benzene ring fused to a pyrimidine ring to form benzo[b]azabenzene.
class.name: Quinolines and derivatives

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as 4-aroylquinolines. These are compounds containing a quinoline which carries an aroyl group at the 4-position. An aroyl group is a univalent radical R-CO- derived from an aromatic carboxylic acid.

direct_parent.description: Compounds containing a quinoline which carries an aroyl group at the 4-position. An aroyl group is a univalent radical R-CO- derived from an aromatic carboxylic acid.
direct_parent.name: 4-aroylquinolines

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Compounds containing a quinoline which carries an aroyl group at the 4-position. An aroyl group is a univalent radical R-CO- derived from an aromatic carboxylic acid.
subclass.name: 4-aroylquinolines

superclass.description: Compounds containing a ring with least one carbon atom and one non-carbon atom.
superclass.name: Organoheterocyclic compounds
